Now, different types of hysterectomies have varying approaches. Vaginal hysterectomy accesses the cervix via the vagina, so maybe less chance of hitting the ureters? But wait, even then, there might be risks if they're dissected close to the bladder or other areas.

Vaginal Hysterectomy (Option A): While still posing moderate risk depending on surgeon experience and patient-specific factors, modern techniques emphasize meticulous dissection preserving ureteral integrity.
